summary: Self-serve corpus/pack/manifest upload contract (#43, 2026-07-04). The pack, corpus, and manifest all ride the SAME /api/bridge/brain/* resumable pipeline; the only difference is `kind`. Served so no agent greps blind. Human doc: docs/corpus-contract.md (repo).

auth.owner: x-admin-token: <COUNCIL_ADMIN_TOKEN> + body.actor on init (upload on behalf of a member)
auth.contract_version_header: x-contract-version: 2.0  (literal 2.0 on init/chunk/commit; 409 contract_mismatch otherwise). NOTE: the manifest CONTENT contract field is "2.1" - a different thing from this transport header.

body.manifest: array of {idx:int, sha256:hex, bytes?:int} - PER-CHUNK hashes for transfer integrity, NOT per-file
body.actor: owner uploads only: the target member

chunk.verify: each chunk sha256 must equal the init manifest entry (422 on mismatch)

body.sha256: whole-blob sha256 hex (must equal init sha; 422 object_hash_mismatch)

commit.returns: { ok:true, schemaVersion:1, brainVersion, actor, kind, sha256, committedAt, corpusGuard?, droppedFiles? }

consentManifest.actor: MUST equal the upload target actor (403 consent_actor_mismatch)
consentManifest.expiresAt: optional ISO8601; if present must be in the future (412 consent_expired)

manifestFloor.description: The kind:"manifest" artifact's BLOB is canonical JSON (corpus-contract section 6/7), verified FAIL-CLOSED at commit.

requiredKeys.pack_sha256: lowercase 64-hex - MUST equal your currently-committed pack row sha (409 manifest_mismatch kind=pack)
requiredKeys.corpus_sha256: lowercase 64-hex - MUST equal your currently-committed corpus row sha (409 manifest_mismatch kind=corpus)

optionalKeys.droppedFiles: array of {path, reason} (both non-empty strings; producer computes the delta, hub shape-validates only)

manifestFloor.notes: No per-file sha list is required; the code-blob whole-sha (= corpus_sha256) is the integrity anchor.

order.corpus_ready_flip: committing the CORPUS flips GET /api/bridge/corpus-status?actor=<you> -> corpus_ready:true (a corpus row now exists)
order.paired_flip: committing the MANIFEST last (both shas verified against live rows) makes your seat read PAIRED (dashboard manifestReady / meeting-open pin state=paired)
order.stale_rule: if pack or corpus changes AFTER the manifest, the pin reads 'stale' until a fresh manifest is committed last again

reference: Arke genesis-kit council-prep-upload.ts does exactly pack->corpus->manifest (manifest last). Conform to it.
